title: Molten Spicy Ethiopian Fish Stew
description: A pescatarian-friendly Ethiopian dish featuring fish, frozen peas, and caramelized onions in a spicy herbal sauce, kid-friendly and delicious. This stew is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the berbere spice and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fish and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the frozen peas, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until the fish is cooked through and the peas are tender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
